articles.title: A Musician Says Goodbye to His TV Show
articles.summary: Labrinth is a musician who makes music for a TV show called Euphoria. He has decided to leave the show and the music industry. He shared this news on Instagram, saying he is done with it. Labrinth wrote songs and music for the first two seasons of Euphoria, which is a popular show about teenagers. Last year, the show added another famous composer, Hans Zimmer, to help with the music for the new season. Labrinth had said he was happy about this before. But now, he is criticizing the show and the company that releases the music. It is not clear why he is leaving or if his music will still be in the new season. Euphoria started in 2019 and has helped many young actors become famous. The new season will start in April, and the characters will be older.

articles.title: Why the UK Economy Was Wobbly Before Iran War
articles.summary: The UK economy was already having a tough time before the war in Iran started. In 2025, people stopped spending as much because they were worried about taxes going up and more people losing their jobs. Even in early 2026, things didn't get better, with fewer people eating out or staying in hotels. Then, the war in Iran made petrol prices go up by 6% in less than two weeks. This means families have to pay more for gas, electricity, food, and other things. Higher prices could make people spend less, slow down the economy, and cause more unemployment. The good news is that the UK uses energy more efficiently now, so it's not as badly affected by oil price spikes. But if the war continues, the economy might grow very slowly or even shrink. The government might need to help, but it's careful because of debt from past crises.

articles.title: How Scientists Found Clues to Make Gold in Space
articles.summary: Scientists have solved a big mystery about how gold is made in space. Gold forms when stars explode or crash together. This process is called the r-process, where atoms grab many neutrons quickly, become unstable, and then break apart. A team from the University of Tennessee worked with other scientists at CERN in Europe to study this. They used a rare atom called indium-134 and watched it decay into tin atoms. They discovered how two neutrons are released during this decay, which helps us understand how gold is created. This research can help make better models of stars and predict how strange atoms behave. It's like finding a missing piece in a puzzle about space and elements.

articles.title: Kaye Adams Says Stories About Her Are Not True
articles.summary: Kaye Adams is a TV and radio presenter who used to work for BBC Scotland. She left her job in October after someone at the BBC complained about how she acted. Kaye says that stories about her being mean to an intern and using a bad word are not true. She feels very sad because she worked hard for 15 years, and now people are saying things that hurt her. Kaye posted on Instagram to tell everyone that these stories are false. The BBC says they do not talk about individual people, but they take complaints seriously. Kaye is also on other shows like Loose Women and was on Strictly Come Dancing. The BBC has a program called 'Call it Out' to help staff report bad behavior.

articles.title: KPop Demon Hunters Gets a New Movie on Netflix
articles.summary: Netflix is making a new KPop Demon Hunters movie because the first one was very popular. The first movie is about three girls in a K-pop group who are also secret demon hunters. It might win awards at the Oscars. The directors and singers are excited to show more of Korea's music and stories in the sequel. They want to keep the fun energy from the first film. No one knows when the new movie will come out yet.

articles.title: A Space Crash with a Surprise Shape
articles.summary: Scientists found something amazing in space! A black hole and a neutron star crashed into each other. Black holes are super strong places where nothing can escape, and neutron stars are tiny, dense stars. Usually, before they crash, they move in circles like a merry-go-round. But this time, they were moving in an oval shape, like an egg. This is a big surprise because scientists thought they always moved in circles. The discovery helps us learn more about how these space objects form and where they come from. It was found using special tools called gravitational wave detectors that feel ripples in space. This tells us that space is full of surprises and we need to keep exploring!
